name: Challah Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the yeast package.
2. Mix water, sugar, and yeast in a large bowl until combined.
3. Add bread flour, salt, applesauce, egg beaters, and poppy seeds to the wet mixture. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
4. Shape the dough into a log and place it in a greased 1-pound loaf pan.
5. Cover the pan with plastic wrap and let rise at room temperature until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
6. Gently invert the dough onto a piece of parchment paper.
7. Using a sharp knife or kitchen shears, cut a strip around the center of the dough to create two long strands.
8. Loosely braid the strands and place them back into the greased loaf pan, seam-side up.
9. Cover the pan with plastic wrap again and let proof in a warm area until nearly doubled in size, about 30 minutes.
10. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the yeast package.
11. Bake for the time recommended by the yeast manufacturer, or until golden brown.
12. Remove from the oven and allow to cool before slicing.
